service_metadata.language_rationale: Canonical native language of this service in GoogleCloudPlatform/microservices-demo (hipstershop), pinned constant across all models/reps for cross-language comparability (FR-31).

context.language_rationale: Canonical native language of this service in GoogleCloudPlatform/microservices-demo (hipstershop), pinned constant across all models/reps for cross-language comparability (FR-31).

config.task_description: Implement the **AdService** gRPC service for the Online Boutique microservices demo, in **java** (its canonical native language). Provides contextual text ads based on supplied context keywords. Implement exactly the RPCs defined for AdService in the embedded demo.proto contract: GetAds. Wire up a gRPC server that serves these RPCs. Do not implement any other service from the proto.
